name: Stuffed Artichokes - Carciofi Ripieni
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off artichoke stems and slice the remaining part, reserving it.
2. Remove and discard the hard outer leaves of the artichokes.
3. Trim the sharp tips from the remaining leaves using scissors.
4. Slice about ½ inch from the top end of each artichoke.
5. Open the artichokes gently with your hands and remove the fuzzy choke with a knife or melon-baller.
6. Wash the artichokes thoroughly under cold running water.
7. Slice the lemon in half and rub it over the cut tops of the artichokes.
8. Place the artichokes, cut side down, on paper towels.
9. Remove crusts from the bread slices.
10. Chop the bread into small pieces and place them in a medium bowl.
11. Add ½ cup olive oil, chopped parsley, minced garlic, salt, and pepper to the bowl; mix well.
12. Arrange the mixture between the artichoke leaves and in their centers.
13. Place the stuffed artichokes and reserved stems in a large saucepan.
14. Pour water into the pan until it is about 1 inch deep.
15. Add 3 to 4 tablespoons olive oil.
16. Bring the water to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium and cover the pan.
17. Cook the artichokes for 40 to 60 minutes, depending on their size; add more water if necessary.
18. After cooking, there should be about 4 to 5 tablespoons of sauce left in the pan.
19. If too much liquid remains, uncover the pan and boil it down until desired consistency is achieved.
20. Spoon the sauce over the artichokes and stems.
21. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
